language.dpinstTitle: Amptek Legacy DPP WinUSB Driver Installer
language.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Legacy DPP WinUSB Installer!
language.welcomeIntro: This wizard will walk you through updating the drivers for your Legacy DPP device.
language.installHeaderTitle: Installing the driver software for your Legacy DPP device...
language.finishTitle: Congratulations! You are finished installing your Legacy DPP device.
language.finishText: Enjoy using the Legacy DPP device.
